Is_APN¶

Given a function in its univariate form, return true if it is APN and false otherwise

 1function IsAPN(f)
 2   P:=Parent(f);
 3   F<al>:=BaseRing(P);
 4   n:=Degree(F);
 5   for i in [0..2^n-2] do
 6      a:=al^i;
 7      set_b:={}; set_a:={};
 8         for y in F do if not y in set_a then
 9         b:=Evaluate(f,y+a)-Evaluate(f,y);
10            if b notin set_b then Include(~set_b,b);
11            else return false;
12            end if;
13   Include(~set_a,y+a);
14   end if;
15         end for;
16      end for;
17   return true;
18end function;
